query: SELECT id, ticker, name, totalQuantity, averageCost, totalCost, currency FROM assets WHERE ticker IN ('SBSP3', 'TTEN3', 'PLTR', 'LMT', 'URNM', 'INDA', 'INDA ETF') ORDER BY ticker;
